zh.lifeSummary: 當Rose於1616年出生在英國貝德福爾亨洛福時，她的父親John Tilley27歲，母親Joan Hurst27歲。她於1643年之前與Hugh Hyllier在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼亞爾姆斯結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1687年11月29日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼巴恩斯塔波享年71歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Rose于1616年出生在英国貝德福爾亨洛福时，她的父亲John Tilley27岁，母亲Joan Hurst27岁。她于1643年之前与Hugh Hyllier在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼亞爾姆斯结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1687年11月29日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼巴恩斯塔波享年71岁。

nameMeanings.name: Rose
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Ostensibly from the vocabulary word denoting the flower (Latin rosa). However, the name was in use throughout the Middle Ages, long before any of the other girls' names derived from flowers, which are generally of 19th-century origin. In part it may refer to the flower as a symbol of the Virgin Mary, but it seems more likely that it also has a Germanic origin, probably as a short form of various girls' names based on hros ‘horse’ or hrōd ‘fame’. The Latinate form Rohesia is commonly found in documents of the Middle Ages. As well as being a name in its own right, it is currently used as a short form of Rosemary and, less often (because of their different pronunciation), of other names beginning Ros-, such as Rosalind and Rosamund .

historicEvents.description: In 1620, after 2 rough months at sea, 102 Pilgrims landed at Plymouth Rock and established one of the very first English settlements in America.

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When Rose was born in 1616, in Henlow, Bedfordshire, England, her father, John Tilley, was 27 and her mother, Joan Hurst, was 27. She married Hugh Hyllier before 1643, in Yarmouth, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died on 29 November 1687, in Barnstable, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 71.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Rose est née en 1616, à Henlow, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, son père, John Tilley, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Joan Hurst, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé Hugh Hyllier avant 1643, à Yarmouth, Plymouth Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 29 novembre 1687, à Barnstable, Plymouth Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 71 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Rose 1616 in Henlow, Bedfordshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Tilley 27 und ihre Mutter Joan Hurst 27. Sie hat vor 1643 in Yarmouth, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America Hugh Hyllier geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 29. November 1687 im Alter von 71 Jahren in Barnstable, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Rose è nata il nel 1616 nel Henlow, Bedfordshire, England, sua padre, John Tilley, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Joan Hurst, aveva 27 anni. Lei sposato Hugh Hyllier prima del 1643, nel Yarmouth, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 29 novembre 1687, nel Barnstable, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 71 anni.

ja.Yarmouth, Plymouth Colony, British Colon: イギリス植民地アメリカプリモウス コロニーヤーモウス
ja.lifeSummary: Roseが1616年にイギリスベドフォードシュアイアヘンロウで生まれた時，父John Tilleyは27歳，母Joan Hurstは27歳であった。1643年以前にイギリス植民地アメリカプリモウス コロニーヤーモウスでHugh Hyllierと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1687年11月29日にイギリス植民地アメリカプリモウス コロニーバーンスタブルで71歳で死去した。

ko.Yarmouth, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay,: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 바른스타블일 야모우스

ko.lifeSummary: Rose(이)가 1616년 영국 베드퍼드실르 헨로에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Tilley(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan Hurst(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 1643년 이전 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 플림우스 콜론이 야모우스에서 Hugh Hyllier(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1687년 11월 29일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 플림우스 콜론이 바른스타블일에서 71세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Rose nasceu em 1616, em Henlow, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Tilley, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Joan Hurst, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com Hugh Hyllier antes 1643, em Yarmouth, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 29 de novembro de 1687, em Barnstable, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America, com 71 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Rose родилась в 1616 г. в местности хенлоу, бедфордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени John Tilley было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Hurst, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Hugh Hyllier перед 1643 г. в местности ярмоут, плимоут колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла 29 ноября 1687 г. в местности барнстабл, плимоут колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 71 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Rose nació en 1616, en Henlow, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John Tilley, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Joan Hurst, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Hugh Hyllier antes de 1643, en Yarmouth, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 29 de noviembre de 1687, en Barnstable, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 71 años.
